message:
fix(runtime): Memory ordering fixes + cancel-drain lifecycle tests

Scheduler (three_lane.rs):
- Fix shutdown flag ordering: Relaxed → Release for store, Acquire for
  load across all 6 sites (shutdown(), is_shutdown(), run_loop(), park
  check, run_once). Without Acquire/Release pairing, worker threads
  could miss shutdown signal due to store buffer forwarding.
- Fix cancel streak fallback: when no ready work exists, dispatch a
  cancel but don't extend cancel_streak (the limit already bounds
  consecutive cancel dispatches). Only increment cancel_dispatches
  and fallback_cancel_dispatches counters.
- Fix loop range: 0..n_cancel+1 → 0..=n_cancel (equivalent but idiomatic)

Worker (worker.rs):
- Replace non-deterministic rand_bool() (SystemTime-based) with
  DetRng::new(0x5eed_1234).next_bool() for deterministic test scheduling

Local queue (local_queue.rs):
- Add Arc::ptr_eq guard before debug_assert in steal_batch: return false
  early if states don't match, preventing UB in release builds where
  debug_assert is elided

State (state.rs):
- Add comprehensive cancel-drain-finalize lifecycle tests:
  - cancel_drain_finalize_full_lifecycle: cancel request → task completions
    → region closes → sync finalizer runs
  - cancel_preserves_child_region_structure: nested regions handle
    cancellation without corrupting parent-child relationships
  - cancel_with_obligations_drains_cleanly: obligations acquired before
    cancel are properly aborted during drain phase
  - double_cancel_is_idempotent: second cancel request is no-op
  - cancel_during_finalization_is_rejected: cancel after region enters
    Finalizing state returns empty task list

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
